properties.query: SELECT * FROM quizzes WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
select content, mafia_Id, quiz_title, quiz_Id from quizzes
select content, mafia_id, quiz_title, quiz_id from quizzes where quiz_id = ?
INSERT INTO quizzes (quiz_id, mafia_id, quiz_title, content, answer, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW())
